summary: PASS. This is the corrected note version: it now explicitly states selectable VADs alone are NOT unique ('Pipecat ships >=3 too; the benchmark data is') and the prior-art section names the three Pipecat analyzers. The two WRONG verdicts from the prior review (against an earlier note version that claimed Pipecat ships one VAD / Rapida uniquely offers three) no longer apply. All 18 checkable assertions verified: vad.go:27 factory, BENCHMARK_COMPARISON.md table values (throughput, latency, init, memory, allocs, granularity, scaling, recommendation matrix), the FireRed 4-state postprocessor, and the three Pipecat VADAnalyzer line-cites are all exact against ground truth.
